__note__: Researched, cited target list (public info). 'email' is set ONLY where cold email is the genuine accepted channel (public intake inbox); others are forms/grants/intros — apply via 'apply'. Verify every address before sending. seed_prospects.py loads the email-channel ones as unsent drafts.

prospects.fit: The only VC dedicated to commercial open-source since 2018; this is a COSS play whose defensible asset is open, re-verifiable provenance.
Pre-seed/seed essential dev/data/security infrastructure with an OSS Spotlight series; a CI-gated provenance dev-tool maps directly.

prospects.partner: Elliot Hershberg; Lenny Pruss / Mike Dauber
prospects.fit: Intersection of dev-tools/OSS-infra and a dedicated Amplify Bio fund. General inbox only — warm intro strongly preferred (low-yield cold).
Biotech×software (Recursion, Enveda). General inbox is low-yield; warm intro preferred. Will raise the 'no data moat' objection first.
Responsible/auditable-AI thesis (Mozilla Manifesto); the no-LLM-figures rule is a textbook fit. Apply via form.
'Inception' pre-seed for dev-first enterprise infra/security (Snyk). Trust-as-a-primitive is adjacent. Apply via form.
Day-0 developer-infra fund with deep OSS roots (Heroku, Chef). Apply via form.
Seed 'computation-meets-biology' thesis; prefers technical seed founders. Apply via contact form.
Research-centric, defensible-from-first-principles AI/bio. Warm intro genuinely required.

prospects.firm: CZI — Essential Open Source Software for Science (EOSS)
prospects.fit: $100K-$400K grants for OSS essential to biomedical research; provenance/reproducibility is exactly what EOSS values. Non-dilutive.
Non-dilutive federal grants for oncology bioinformatics/software. The repo's analysis names this the 'primary, most honest path'. Contact a Program Official first.
Non-dilutive; start with a free Project Pitch to check fit for deep-tech software.
Leading biotech accelerator; cohort funding + lab access. Apply via form (cold email N/A).
Funds OSS/dev-tools and some bio. Application-driven (see pitch/YC.md). Cold email N/A.
Free, nonprofit activator for early bio ventures; network + credibility. Apply via form.
